message:
test(proptest): add 25 property tests for connector_testbed types and behavioral invariants

Serde roundtrips for MockProvider, MockRequest, ChaosScenario, SandboxEscapeAttempt,
SandboxEscapeResult, SandboxProbeReport, IngestionFloodReport, TestbedTelemetry,
TestbedSnapshot. Behavioral tests for failure ratio bounds, request log bounding,
failure rate clamping, deterministic outcomes at 0/100% rates, and report consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
